callGraph.callee:
questions.stream()
                .map(q -> new QaRecord(q.questionIndex(), q.question(), q.category(), q.userAnswer())).toList

persistenceService.findBySessionId(sessionId)//通过sessionID获取session，便于下一步获取skillID
                    .map(s -> s.getSkillId()).orElse

report.questionDetails().stream()
                .map(qe -> new QuestionEvaluation(qe.questionIndex(), qe.question(), qe.category(),
                    qe.userAnswer(), qe.score(), qe.feedback())).toList

report.referenceAnswers().stream()
                .map(ra -> new ReferenceAnswer(ra.questionIndex(), ra.question(),
                    ra.referenceAnswer(), ra.keyPoints())).toList

sessions.stream()
            .map(InterviewSessionEntity::getQuestionsJson)//取出其中的question json。::是方法应用，可以装话为lambda表达式:: 是方法引用，等价于 session -> session.getQuestionsJson()
            .filter(json -> json != null && !json.isEmpty()).flatMap

directionQuestions.stream()
                    .filter(q -> !q.isFollowUp())//过滤掉追问问题
                    .map(q -> new HistoricalQuestion(q.question(), q.type(), q.topicSummary())).toList

resumeQuestions.stream()
                    .filter(q -> !q.isFollowUp())//过滤掉追问问题
                    .map(q -> new HistoricalQuestion(q.question(), q.type(), q.topicSummary())).toList
